title: salix polyandra
intro: Salix polyandra, also known as the crimson willow or red willow, is a small to medium-sized shrub or tree that belongs to the willow family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which are attributed to the salicylic acid it contains. The health benefits of Salix polyandra include relief from fever, rheumatism, and headache, as well as its use as a digestive aid. Herbal preparations of Salix polyandra can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin.
